scripts.test:coverage: bash -lc 'set -o pipefail; bun test --coverage 2>&1 | tee /tmp/service-auth-coverage.txt; status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}; bun -e "const fs = require(\"fs\"); const text = fs.readFileSync(\"/tmp/service-auth-coverage.txt\", \"utf8\"); const line = text.split(\"\\n\").find(l => l.includes(\"All files\")); if (line) { const parts = line.split(\"|\").map(s => s.trim()); const funcs = parts[1]; const lines = parts[2]; console.log(\"\\nCoverage Summary\\n- Overall Functions Coverage: \" + funcs + \"%\\n- Overall Lines Coverage: \" + lines + \"%\"); }"; exit $status'
scripts.test:coverage:lcov: bash -lc 'set -o pipefail; bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov 2>&1 | tee /tmp/service-auth-coverage.txt; status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}; bun -e "const fs = require(\"fs\"); const text = fs.readFileSync(\"/tmp/service-auth-coverage.txt\", \"utf8\"); const line = text.split(\"\\n\").find(l => l.includes(\"All files\")); if (line) { const parts = line.split(\"|\").map(s => s.trim()); const funcs = parts[1]; const lines = parts[2]; console.log(\"\\nCoverage Summary\\n- Overall Functions Coverage: \" + funcs + \"%\\n- Overall Lines Coverage: \" + lines + \"%\"); }"; exit $status'
scripts.db:setup: bun run db:create && bun run db:migrate
scripts.db:reset: bun run db:drop && bun run db:setup
